title: Keep peers interactive and clean their lifecycle
invariant: Peers never use headless print mode and are consumed, parked with a reason, or killed when no concrete next checkpoint exists.
sharedInstruction: Launch peers as visible interactive CLIs, never print/headless one-shots; after consuming the answer, retain only for a concrete next checkpoint and otherwise clean up the tab and lifecycle state.

claude.mechanism: Launch profiles plus tab peer state/kill

claude: Prompt scope, not OS sandboxing, defines a read-only review.
pi: Immediate teardown may omit an intermediate consumed state.
